overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in Western period clothing walking through a historic city at night. The scene features wet cobblestone streets illuminated by gas lamps, with French Quarter-style architecture including iron balconies and brick buildings, during a light rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between brick wall and historic building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alleyway between a high brick wall and buildings with iron balconies

entered.detail: tall weathered brick wall running along the left side of the alley
historic building with ornate iron balconies and shuttered windows
cast iron gas lamp post emitting warm orange light
scattered wooden planks and construction debris along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed alleyway at night. A tall brick wall runs along the left side while a historic building with ornate iron balconies lines the right. Gas lamps provide the only illumination, casting long shadows on the wet cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with trees transitioning to street

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza area with trees and wider space

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the plaza toward the street ahead, passing trees on the left

entered.detail: mature trees with dense foliage lining the edge of the plaza
open cobblestone area with benches and space between buildings
tall post with circular clock face visible ahead on the left
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza area with trees visible on the left. The character walks toward a street intersection where tram tracks are visible. A street clock stands on the left side as the environment transitions from enclosed alley to open urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks and shop fronts

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street, passing shop fronts and navigating around a parked carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving slowly along the street, passing from left to right

entered.detail: row of historic shop buildings with lit windows and awnings
wooden carriage with covered top and two horses, parked then moving along the street
ornate cast iron street lamp illuminating the wet street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a historic city street with tram tracks running down the center. Shop fronts with warm lighting line the right side. A horse-drawn carriage moves along the left side of the street, passing by as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street approaching grand institutional building

events.description: grand columned building comes into view ahead, dominating the streetscape

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a large columned building, continuing down the main street

entered.detail: imposing neoclassical building with tall stone columns and grand entrance stairs
sign reading 'LEMOYNE NATIONAL BANK' visible on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a grand neoclassical building with tall stone columns that dominates the street corner. The building features a bank sign on its facade. After passing the building, the character continues down the main street with tram tracks, surrounded by historic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, dimly lit alleyway into a grand, open historic city center at night. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow passage flanked by a tall brick wall and ornate iron balconies, where gas lamps cast long shadows across wet cobblestones. As the character moves forward, the enclosed space opens into a wider plaza featuring trees and a street clock before crossing a set of tram tracks at an intersection. The scene then expands into a bustling city street lined with warmly lit shop fronts, passing a horse-drawn carriage moving in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera glides past a massive neoclassical bank building with towering stone columns before continuing down the main thoroughfare surrounded by historic architecture.
